title: cynoglossum australe
intro: Cynoglossum australe, also known as the Australian forked bluebells or blue forget-me-not, is a perennial plant native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum australe include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
